entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet
[info] Xule version: 3.0.30050 -
[info] loaded in 1.53 secs at 2026-05-19T16:23:43 - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1309082/000147793224005266/cei_10ka.htm
[xule.buildIndexTime] Index build time 0:00:00.097825. - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1309082/000147793224005266/cei_10ka.htm
[xule.ruleDebug] Processing: DQC.US.0123.9583 - 16:23:49.644708 - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1309082/000147793224005266/cei_10ka.htm
[xule.ruleDebug] http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1309082/000147793224005266/cei_10ka.htm - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1309082/000147793224005266/cei_10ka.htm

[DQC.US.0123.9583] The company has reported a value for us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest with the axis StatementClassOfStockAxis with a value of -32,596,819 to represent the monetary value of the class of stock in equity. This fact however when used in the Statement of Shareholders Equity must include the Component of Equity and associated member indicating if it is preferred stock, common stock or treasury stock. This error could occur because the filer has either 1) used the incorrect element or 2) has NOT included the Statement Equity Components Axis with the Common Stock or Preferred Stock member on the fact.
The filer should either add the Statement Equity Components Axis and respective stock member in addition to the class of stock axis to the fact, or change the element name from us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest to the appropriate element if the value is not included in Stockholders Equity.
Element : us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest Period : 2023-12-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:StatementClassOfStockAxis=cei:AdditionalPaidInCapitalAdjustmentsMember
Rule Element Id:9583 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - cei_10ka.htm 3

property.name: label
property.value: [Stockholders' Equity, Including Portion Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest]

property.name: unitRef
property.value: USD ($)

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0123.9583] The company has reported a value for us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest with the axis StatementClassOfStockAxis with a value of 0 to represent the monetary value of the class of stock in equity. This fact however when used in the Statement of Shareholders Equity must include the Component of Equity and associated member indicating if it is preferred stock, common stock or treasury stock. This error could occur because the filer has either 1) used the incorrect element or 2) has NOT included the Statement Equity Components Axis with the Common Stock or Preferred Stock member on the fact.
The filer should either add the Statement Equity Components Axis and respective stock member in addition to the class of stock axis to the fact, or change the element name from us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest to the appropriate element if the value is not included in Stockholders Equity.
Element : us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest Period : 2022-12-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:StatementClassOfStockAxis=cei:AdditionalPaidInCapitalAdjustmentsMember
Rule Element Id:9583 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - cei_10ka.htm 3

property.name: label
property.value: [Stockholders' Equity, Including Portion Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest]

property.name: unitRef
property.value: USD ($)

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0123.9583] The company has reported a value for us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest with the axis StatementClassOfStockAxis with a value of 14,486,745 to represent the monetary value of the class of stock in equity. This fact however when used in the Statement of Shareholders Equity must include the Component of Equity and associated member indicating if it is preferred stock, common stock or treasury stock. This error could occur because the filer has either 1) used the incorrect element or 2) has NOT included the Statement Equity Components Axis with the Common Stock or Preferred Stock member on the fact.
The filer should either add the Statement Equity Components Axis and respective stock member in addition to the class of stock axis to the fact, or change the element name from us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest to the appropriate element if the value is not included in Stockholders Equity.
Element : us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest Period : 2023-12-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:StatementClassOfStockAxis=cei:AccumulatedDeficitAdjustmentsMember
Rule Element Id:9583 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - cei_10ka.htm 3

property.name: label
property.value: [Stockholders' Equity, Including Portion Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest]

property.name: unitRef
property.value: USD ($)

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0123.9583] The company has reported a value for us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest with the axis StatementClassOfStockAxis with a value of -122,187,673 to represent the monetary value of the class of stock in equity. This fact however when used in the Statement of Shareholders Equity must include the Component of Equity and associated member indicating if it is preferred stock, common stock or treasury stock. This error could occur because the filer has either 1) used the incorrect element or 2) has NOT included the Statement Equity Components Axis with the Common Stock or Preferred Stock member on the fact.
The filer should either add the Statement Equity Components Axis and respective stock member in addition to the class of stock axis to the fact, or change the element name from us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest to the appropriate element if the value is not included in Stockholders Equity.
Element : us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest Period : 2022-12-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:StatementClassOfStockAxis=cei:RetainenEarningssMember
Rule Element Id:9583 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - cei_10ka.htm 3

property.name: label
property.value: [Stockholders' Equity, Including Portion Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest]

property.name: unitRef
property.value: USD ($)

This fact however when used in the Statement of Shareholders Equity must include the Component of Equity and associated member indicating if it is preferred stock, common stock or treasury stock. This error could occur because the filer has either 1) used the incorrect element or 2) has NOT included the Statement Equity Components Axis with the Common Stock or Preferred Stock member on the fact.
The filer should either add the Statement Equity Components Axis and respective stock member in addition to the class of stock axis to the fact, or change the element name from us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest to the appropriate element if the value is not included in Stockholders Equity.

This fact however when used in the Statement of Shareholders Equity must include the Component of Equity and associated member indicating if it is preferred stock, common stock or treasury stock. This error could occur because the filer has either 1) used the incorrect element or 2) has NOT included the Statement Equity Components Axis with the Common Stock or Preferred Stock member on the fact.
The filer should either add the Statement Equity Components Axis and respective stock member in addition to the class of stock axis to the fact, or change the element name from us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest to the appropriate element if the value is not included in Stockholders Equity.

property.name: unitRef
property.value: USD ($)

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0123.9583] The company has reported a value for us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest with the axis StatementClassOfStockAxis with a value of 127,757,269 to represent the monetary value of the class of stock in equity. This fact however when used in the Statement of Shareholders Equity must include the Component of Equity and associated member indicating if it is preferred stock, common stock or treasury stock. This error could occur because the filer has either 1) used the incorrect element or 2) has NOT included the Statement Equity Components Axis with the Common Stock or Preferred Stock member on the fact.
The filer should either add the Statement Equity Components Axis and respective stock member in addition to the class of stock axis to the fact, or change the element name from us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest to the appropriate element if the value is not included in Stockholders Equity.
Element : us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest Period : 2022-12-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:StatementClassOfStockAxis=cei:AdditionalsPaidInCapitalsMember
Rule Element Id:9583 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - cei_10q.htm 2

property.name: label
property.value: [Stockholders' Equity, Including Portion Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest]

property.name: unitRef
property.value: USD ($)

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0123.9583] The company has reported a value for us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest with the axis StatementClassOfStockAxis with a value of 166,669,397 to represent the monetary value of the class of stock in equity. This fact however when used in the Statement of Shareholders Equity must include the Component of Equity and associated member indicating if it is preferred stock, common stock or treasury stock. This error could occur because the filer has either 1) used the incorrect element or 2) has NOT included the Statement Equity Components Axis with the Common Stock or Preferred Stock member on the fact.
The filer should either add the Statement Equity Components Axis and respective stock member in addition to the class of stock axis to the fact, or change the element name from us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest to the appropriate element if the value is not included in Stockholders Equity.
Element : us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest Period : 2023-09-30 Dimensions : us-gaap:StatementClassOfStockAxis=cei:AdditionalPaidInCapitalAsPreviouslyReportedMember
Rule Element Id:9583 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - cei_10q.htm 2

[DQC.US.0123.9583] The company has reported a value for us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest with the axis StatementClassOfStockAxis with a value of 0 to represent the monetary value of the class of stock in equity. This fact however when used in the Statement of Shareholders Equity must include the Component of Equity and associated member indicating if it is preferred stock, common stock or treasury stock. This error could occur because the filer has either 1) used the incorrect element or 2) has NOT included the Statement Equity Components Axis with the Common Stock or Preferred Stock member on the fact.
The filer should either add the Statement Equity Components Axis and respective stock member in addition to the class of stock axis to the fact, or change the element name from us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest to the appropriate element if the value is not included in Stockholders Equity.

This fact however when used in the Statement of Shareholders Equity must include the Component of Equity and associated member indicating if it is preferred stock, common stock or treasury stock. This error could occur because the filer has either 1) used the incorrect element or 2) has NOT included the Statement Equity Components Axis with the Common Stock or Preferred Stock member on the fact.
The filer should either add the Statement Equity Components Axis and respective stock member in addition to the class of stock axis to the fact, or change the element name from us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest to the appropriate element if the value is not included in Stockholders Equity.

This fact however when used in the Statement of Shareholders Equity must include the Component of Equity and associated member indicating if it is preferred stock, common stock or treasury stock. This error could occur because the filer has either 1) used the incorrect element or 2) has NOT included the Statement Equity Components Axis with the Common Stock or Preferred Stock member on the fact.
The filer should either add the Statement Equity Components Axis and respective stock member in addition to the class of stock axis to the fact, or change the element name from us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest to the appropriate element if the value is not included in Stockholders Equity.
